summary: Iteration 10 - Workouts tab testing completed successfully. All core features working correctly: header, filter chips, 6 category cards, quick picks horizontal scroll, recent workouts list, screen scrollability, and bottom navigation. Tab switching works. Pure UI scaffold with placeholder data as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, ScrollView, TouchableOpacity)
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ Proper use of SafeAreaView with edges prop
✅ LinearGradient used for category card backgrounds
✅ All 6 category cards present with correct labels and testIDs
✅ All 4 quick pick cards present with correct testIDs
✅ All 4 recent workout items present with correct data
✅ Code is clean, well-organized with clear section comments
✅ Proper spacing and padding (8pt grid system)
✅ Touch targets are adequate for mobile interaction
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - pure UI with hardcoded placeholder data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workouts tab (iteration 10) fully functional. All UI elements render correctly, all interactions work (taps, scrolls, navigation). Tab switching between Dashboard, Progress Map, Workouts, and Fuel all working. Previous iterations 1-9 remain functional. No issues found.

test_results_detail.workouts_tab_load: ✅ PASS - Workouts tab loads when tapped from bottom navigation
test_results_detail.header_display: ✅ PASS - Header shows 'WORKOUTS' title and 'Quick workouts built for truckers' subtitle
test_results_detail.filter_chips: ✅ PASS - All filter chips visible and scrollable (All, Bodyweight, Bands, Dumbbells, 5 min, 10 min, 20 min)
test_results_detail.category_cards: ✅ PASS - All 6 category cards visible: Cab Workouts, Truck Stop Workouts, Core, Mobility, Full Body, Quick Reset
test_results_detail.category_icons: ✅ PASS - Each category card has icon and gradient background
test_results_detail.quick_picks_section: ✅ PASS - QUICK PICKS section shows 4 horizontal scrollable cards
test_results_detail.quick_pick_content: ✅ PASS - Quick pick cards show title, duration, and Iron Miles chip
test_results_detail.recent_workouts_section: ✅ PASS - RECENT WORKOUTS section shows 4 history items
test_results_detail.recent_workouts_data: ✅ PASS - History items show correct titles: Cab Upper Body Strength, Back Saver Reset, Truck Stop Full Body, Core Lockdown
test_results_detail.screen_scrollability: ✅ PASS - Screen scrolls smoothly from top to bottom
test_results_detail.bottom_nav_active: ✅ PASS - Bottom navigation shows Workouts tab as active (golden highlight)
test_results_detail.tab_switching: ✅ PASS - Can switch between all tabs (Dashboard, Progress Map, Fuel, Workouts) and back
test_results_detail.dashboard_flow: ✅ PASS - Dashboard and Generate Workout flow still work correctly
